content.body:
### Penanggung Jawab Project
- **Project Manager:** Elsa

### Tim Backend (3 Orang)
- Fajar
- Nabilah
- Fatin

### Tim Frontend (3 Orang)
- Tetep
- Nabil
- Fazna

### Tim Testing
- Aldy

### Timeline
- Mulai: 11 Mei 2026
- Selesai: 18 Juni 2026

### Catatan
- Pembagian penugasan dan pelaksanaan pekerjaan mengacu pada file rekayasa yang sudah ada.
- Silakan gunakan issues dan checklist untuk mendokumentasikan progres tugas masing-masing anggota.

### Tugas Lanjutan
- [ ] Penyesuaian tugas harian/mingguan sesuai file rekayasa
- [ ] Pembagian modul pada backend dan frontend
- [ ] Progress report mingguan oleh project manager
- [ ] Testing aplikasi sebelum deadline

> Pastikan setiap sub-tugas dan pembagian kerja diformulasikan sebagai issue terpisah sesuai kebutuhan.
content.title: Project Management dan Penugasan Tim: Backend, Frontend, dan Testing

content.body:
## Deskripsi
Implementasi endpoint autentikasi sesuai API Documentation section 5.1.

## Tasks
- [ ] POST /api/auth/register (customer & provider)
- [ ] POST /api/auth/login (return token)
- [ ] POST /api/auth/logout
- [ ] Middleware role-based access (FR-04)
- [ ] Password hashing (NFR-05)
- [ ] Unit test auth endpoints

## Acceptance Criteria
- Register mengembalikan user_id & role
- Login mengembalikan token valid
- Endpoint protected menolak request tanpa token (401)

## Referensi
- API Doc 5.1
- SRS FR-01 s/d FR-04

content.body:
## Deskripsi
Logika bisnis pembuatan tagihan DP 50% otomatis saat order dibuat.

## Tasks
- [ ] Service: hitung DP = 50% dari estimated_price
- [ ] Insert Payment record (type=DP, status=UNPAID) saat order CREATED
- [ ] Auto-create Final Payment saat order COMPLETED
- [ ] Hitung final_amount = final_price - dp_amount
- [ ] Validasi: order CLOSED hanya jika Final PAID (BR-03)
- [ ] Database transaction untuk atomicity (NFR-09)

## Referensi
- SRS BR-01, BR-02, BR-03
- API Doc response POST /api/orders
content.title: [Backend] Auto-create DP Payment saat Order dibuat (BR-01)

content.body:
## Deskripsi
Implementasi endpoint webhook untuk menerima callback dari payment gateway.

## Tasks
- [ ] POST /api/webhooks/payments (no auth, dengan signature verification)
- [ ] Verifikasi signature/secret dari payment gateway (NFR-06)
- [ ] Update Payment status: PAID / FAILED / EXPIRED
- [ ] Jika DP PAID: trigger notifikasi event dp_paid
- [ ] Jika Final PAID: update Order status → CLOSED + trigger final_paid
- [ ] Logging semua webhook ke notification_logs
- [ ] Test webhook dengan ngrok / Midtrans simulator

## Referensi
- API Doc 5.4, SRS FR-17, FR-20
- Business Rule 4: Webhook wajib verifikasi signature

items.title: [Backend] Webhook Payment Callback & Status Update (FR-17, FR-20)

content.body:
## Deskripsi
Setup n8n dan integrasi event notifikasi ke WhatsApp/Email.

## Tasks
- [ ] Setup n8n container (sudah ada di docker-compose)
- [ ] Buat workflow n8n untuk setiap event:
  - order_created → WA ke customer & provider
  - order_accepted → WA ke customer
  - order_rejected → WA ke customer
  - dp_paid → WA ke customer & provider
  - order_completed → WA ke customer (minta bayar pelunasan)
  - final_paid → WA ke semua
- [ ] POST /api/integrations/n8n/events
- [ ] Konfigurasi WA provider di n8n (Fonnte/Wablas/dll)
- [ ] Catat ke notification_logs setiap pengiriman

## Referensi
- API Doc 5.5
- SRS FR-21, FR-22
- Component Diagram: Backend → n8n → WA/Email
content.title: [Backend] Integrasi n8n – Event Notifikasi (FR-21, FR-22)
